Banner.title: Setup before Mar 17, 2026?
Banner.description: Anthropic changed their OAuth policy. Re-run the setup to fix your scheduler.

Metadata.title: TokFresh - Claude Token Reset Automation
Metadata.description: Automate your Claude Pro/Max token reset timing with Cloudflare Workers. Schedule 5-hour cycles to align with your workday. Free, secure, 24/7 automatic.

Landing.badge: Free forever. No API keys needed.
Landing.heroDescription: Schedule automatic API calls to start your 5-hour cycle exactly when you want. Use your Claude tokens more efficiently.
Landing.tokenMathSubtitle: Claude resets every 5 hours from your first call.
Landing.tokenMathPunchlineDetail: without waking up at 6 AM yourself
Landing.withoutDescription: Hit the limit mid-task. Wait hours, then finish the rest.
Landing.withDescription: No interruption — fresh tokens kick in while you're deep in a session. Set your start time and TokFresh aligns every cycle to your routine.
Landing.featuresSubtitle: Set it once and forget. Works 24/7, even when your computer is off.
Landing.feature1Description: Computer off? No problem. Cloudflare Workers run on the edge, automatically triggering your token timer on schedule.
Landing.feature2Description: Cloudflare free tier gives you 100,000 requests/day. You use 5. Combined with your existing Claude subscription: $0/month.
Landing.feature3Description: We never collect or store your tokens. Everything is processed in your browser and deployed directly to YOUR Cloudflare account.
Landing.howSubtitle: 1 minute to set up. Zero maintenance after that.
Landing.how1Description: One-click OAuth with your Claude Pro or Max subscription. No API keys needed.
Landing.how2Description: Choose when your 5-hour cycles start. We auto-calculate the full daily schedule.
Landing.how3Description: Auto-deploy a worker to your free Cloudflare account. Runs forever at zero cost.
Landing.ctaTitle: Ready to optimize your Claude workflow?
Landing.ctaDescription: Set up in 1 minute. Free forever. Your computer can be off.
Landing.ctaPrivacy: We never collect or store your credentials.
Landing.faq1Question: How do I change my schedule?
Landing.faq1Answer: Run the setup again. It deploys to the same worker, so a new deployment replaces the existing one with your updated schedule. Alternatively, you can edit the cron expression(UTC) directly in the Trigger Events section of your

Setup.title: Set Up TokFresh
Setup.step1Description: Authorize TokFresh to trigger API calls with your Claude subscription.
Setup.step1RequiresDescription: You need an active Claude Pro or Max subscription to use this service.
Setup.step1AfterAuth: After authorizing on claude.ai, you'll see an authorization code. Copy and paste it below.
Setup.step1Privacy: Your token is exchanged in your browser only and sent directly to your Cloudflare account. TokFresh never collects or stores it.
Setup.step1SessionExpired: Session expired. Please connect Claude again.
Setup.step2Description: Choose when your 5-hour token cycles should start.
Setup.step2SkipNote: The 5th trigger is skipped because 5 × 5h = 25h exceeds 24h. It would overlap with the next day's first cycle, making both ineffective.
Setup.step3Description: Get notified when the token timer is triggered.
Setup.step4Description: Deploy a worker to your Cloudflare account that runs automatically.
Setup.step4TokenStep4: Set Account Resources to your account
Setup.step4TokenStep5: Set Zone Resources to your zone (domain)
Setup.step4Privacy: This token is used once to deploy the worker, then discarded. TokFresh never stores your Cloudflare credentials.
Setup.step4SubdomainDescription: Your Cloudflare account needs a workers.dev subdomain. Open the Workers dashboard once to create it automatically.
Setup.successDescription: Your token scheduler is deployed and running.
Setup.successOffNote: Your computer can be off — the worker runs automatically on Cloudflare's edge network!
Setup.subscribeDescription: Your worker runs a fixed code snapshot. If Anthropic changes their API headers, OAuth policy, or model endpoints, your scheduler will break silently. Leave your email and we'll notify you when a re-setup is needed.
Setup.subscribeSuccess: You're subscribed! We'll only email you when action is needed.
Setup.subscribeError: Failed to subscribe. Please try again.
